news_bbc.title: Tech stocks plunge in Asia after record rally and renewed Middle East attacks

news_bbc.title: You may be saving for retirement without realising it. Here's how to check

news_bbc.summary: The scheme aims to tackle the "growing challenge" of young people not in employment, education, or training.

news_bbc.summary: The Netherlands has one of the world's lowest rates of 16 to 24-year-olds not in education, employment or training.

news_bbc.title: Spain's visitor numbers hit new highs as tourists avoid Middle East
news_bbc.summary: The European country had 9.1 million international visitors in April, the most ever for that month.

news_bbc.summary: Plans for £1.25bn steel-making furnace may be delayed by electrical connectivity problem, Tata says.

news_bbc.title: I was applying for hundreds of jobs - this tip helped me get one
news_bbc.summary: Four people who weren't hearing back from job applications shared what they did differently to secure their first role.

news_bbc.title: Cake sheds are making bakers £1,000 a week - but the dream might be over
